summary: The user is seeking inspiration for a painting project and has recently completed an online course on color theory. They plan to explore Impressionism and Fauvism, focusing on a cityscape of Paris along the Seine River, using a Split-Complementary color scheme with blue-green, orange-red, and yellow-orange to capture the vibrant energy of the city.
facts: The user finished an online course on color theory on the same day as the chat session. The user plans to create a cityscape painting set in Paris, focusing on a street scene or building along the Seine River. The user intends to use Impressionist and Fauvist techniques, incorporating soft, feathery brushstrokes and bold, geometric forms. The user is considering a color palette based on a Split-Complementary harmony scheme, using blue-green as the central color, with orange-red and yellow-orange as split-complementary colors. The user aims to evoke a sense of calm with blue-green while adding contrast and energy with orange-red and yellow-orange. The user is interested in capturing the vibrant colors and energy of the city in their painting.
